markets.question: Spread: EC Bahia (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for March 15 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "EC Bahia" if EC Bahia win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "SC Internacional".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game between CD La Equidad Seguros and CA Bucaramanga, scheduled for March 14 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CD La Equidad Seguros and CA Bucaramanga each score at least one goal during the game.
